originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_I2C true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 true))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 24: `int codec_hw_write = i2c_master_send` in ak4642_init() (SOC_AK4642=T, I2C=T). FSI_AK4642=T implies SOC_AK4642=T (consistent). codec_hw_write is assigned but never read — dead store. No '// ERROR' at L24 for dead store → new bug not in VBDB. Required condition: SOC_AK4642=T AND I2C=T. PC adds FSI_DA7210=F and SOC_DA7210=T unnecessarily (da7210_init() is irrelevant to ak4642_init()). PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
